description: Hardcoded API key and database password exposed in application configuration module

input.diff:
diff --git a/src/config.py b/src/config.py
index 0000000..a1b2c3d 100644
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/config.py
@@ -0,0 +1,18 @@
+"""Application configuration."""
+
+class Config:
+    DEBUG = False
+    DATABASE_HOST = "prod-db.internal.company.com"
+    DATABASE_PORT = 5432
+    DATABASE_PASSWORD = "sup3r_s3cret_pr0d_p@ss!"
+    API_KEY = "EXAMPLE-KEY-abc123def456ghi789jkl012mno345"
+    PAYMENT_SECRET_KEY = "EXAMPLE-SECRET-4eC39HqLyjWDarjtT1zdp7dc"
+
+    @staticmethod
+    def get_db_url():
+        return (
+            f"postgresql://admin:{Config.DATABASE_PASSWORD}"
+            f"@{Config.DATABASE_HOST}:{Config.DATABASE_PORT}/appdb"
+        )
